Cross-Reference Analysis

🔥 Overlap: Trending AND Making Money (Same Categories)

Category Trendshift Project TrustMRR Company Insight
AI Video Generation AI Short Video Engine (6.3k★) Vid.AI ($96k MRR) AI video is hyped AND monetizing — validated demand
AI Agent Tools/Skills Agent Skills Collection (18.3k★), Production Skills (22.6k★) DM Champ ($187k MRR), PROSP ($128k MRR) Agent infrastructure is the hottest vertical — both open-source excitement and real revenue
SEO/Content Code Search MCP (8.3k★) SEOBOT ($73k MRR), AEO Engine ($55k MRR), SEO STACK ($67k MRR) AI-powered SEO is a crowded, revenue-rich space
Developer Education Build Your Own X (492.8k★), CS Study Plan (341.7k★) Codédex ($84k MRR), DataExpert ($62k MRR) Education has massive reach; monetization is steady but not explosive
Design/Brand Tools DESIGN.md (64.5k★), Huashu Design (4.7k★) Artboard Studio ($38k MRR) AI design tools getting attention but monetization lagging
LLM Infrastructure Langfuse (25.8k★), RAG-Anything (18.1k★) Cometly ($216k MRR), ChatDash ($47k MRR) LLM infra is both open-source darling and revenue generator

💰 Money-Makers Nobody's Talking About (TrustMRR Only, High Revenue, Low Hype)

  1. Stan ($3.57M MRR) — Self-employment platform. Zero hype on GitHub, absolutely printing money. The MRR is 10x the #2 spot.
  2. TrimRx ($324k MRR) — GLP-1 telehealth. Riding the Ozempic wave with real revenue. No open-source equivalent.
  3. Kibu ($234k MRR) — Niche health software for I/DD providers. Invisible to devs, critical to its market. 48 states.
  4. Supliful ($197k MRR) — Creator CPG platform. Bridge between influencer economy and physical products.
  5. Dealsourcr ($152k MRR, 22% growth) — Real estate deal sourcing. High growth, boring category, real money.

🚀 Trending With No Monetization (Trendshift Only — Opportunity)

  1. Leaked System Prompts (25.4k★) — Pure transparency play. Could monetize via premium analysis/monitoring service.
  2. Headless Browser for AI (1.6k★) — Infrastructure play. Could be the Puppeteer for AI agents (SaaS/API).
  3. ml-intern (1.5k★) — Open-source ML engineer. Could offer managed ML training as a service.
  4. Desktop AI Skills Manager (1k★) — Multi-platform skill management. SaaS with sync/team features.
  5. RAG-Anything (18.1k★) — RAG framework with no clear monetization. Hosted RAG-as-a-service is obvious next step.

Key Patterns

  1. AI Agent Skills are the new packages — Multiple repos (18k, 22k, 8k stars) are building skill ecosystems for coding agents. This is becoming a standard layer, like npm for AI. Expect consolidation.
  2. SEO is being rebuilt for AI — SEOBOT, AEO Engine, SEO STACK, Launch Club all targeting AI-era search optimization. The entire SEO industry is pivoting from Google-blue-links to LLM-visibility.
  3. Health/telehealth is quietly massive — TrimRx ($324k), Kibu ($234k), Medical Practice ($151k). None trending on GitHub. Regulated verticals = moats = money.
  4. Design systems for AI coding agents — DESIGN.md (64.5k★), Huashu Design (4.7k★). People are building brand systems specifically for AI agents to consume. New category.
  5. Creator economy tools are bifurcating — Stan ($3.57M MRR) vs. AI short video engine (6.3k★). One makes money helping creators sell; the other excites devs automating content.

Quick Takes

  • Build for agents, sell to agencies. DM Champ ($187k), PROSP ($128k), Bookedin ($50k) all sell AI agent capacity to agencies who resell it. The B2B2B model for AI agents is proven.
  • If you're building RAG tools, ship a hosted version yesterday. RAG-Anything has 18k stars and zero MRR. The gap between GitHub love and revenue is where competitors win.
  • Stan at $3.57M MRR with zero dev-community presence proves: you don't need to be loved by Hacker News to win. The biggest money is in boring verticals with real customers.

Sources: trendshift.io, trustmrr.com | Fetched: 2026-04-25T01:00Z
